### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/gvisor-tap-vsock (github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock)</summary>

### [`v0.7.5`](https://togithub.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/releases/tag/v0.7.5)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/compare/v0.7.4...v0.7.5)

This release fixes a podman regression: [https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/23616](https://togithub.com/containers/podman/issues/23616)

#### What's Changed

-   deps: Revert inetaf/tcpproxy commit [`2862066`](https://togithub.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/commit/2862066) by [@​cfergeau](https://togithub.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/386](https://togithub.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/386)
-   ghactions: Automatically create gh releases by [@​cfergeau](https://togithub.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/374](https://togithub.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/374)

##### Dependency updates

-   build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/gomega from 1.33.1 to 1.34.1 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/376](https://togithub.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/376)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.22.0 to 0.24.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/381](https://togithub.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/381)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/miekg/dns from 1.1.61 to 1.1.62 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/382](https://togithub.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/382)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/crypto from 0.25.0 to 0.26.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/380](https://togithub.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/380)
-   Update golangci-lint to v1.60.1 by [@​cfergeau](https://togithub.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/384](https://togithub.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/384)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/vishvananda/netlink from 1.2.1-beta.2 to 1.2.1 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/388](https://togithub.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/388)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/vishvananda/netlink from 1.2.1 to 1.3.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/389](https://togithub.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/389)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/compare/v0.7.4...v0.7.5

</details>

---
Unless the HTTP status code above is >= 500,  please check your configuration for:

1. typos in owner and project name (groups need to be prefixed with `@`)
2. whether the project name doesn't contain not allowed characters (only letters, digits, underscores, dashes and dots must be used)
3. whether the project itself exists (Packit creates projects only in its own namespace)
4. whether Packit is allowed to build in your Copr project
5. whether your Copr project/group is not private
